ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PF, C, SF) */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "avg_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (in feet-inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* Home city of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the arena where the team plays */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the arena */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game (in ET) */,
  "tv_broadcast" TEXT /* TV broadcast information for the game */,
  "radio_broadcast" TEXT /* Radio broadcast information for the game */,
  "ticket_price_range" TEXT /* Range of ticket prices for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game participation */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience as a coach */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Coaching record (e.g., win-loss-draw) */,
  "coaching_style" TEXT /* Coaching style of the coach */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's statistical record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins for the team in the season */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses for the team in the season */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws for the team in the season */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the team in the season */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Total points allowed by the team in the season */,
  "average_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game by the team in the season */,
  "average_points_allowed_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game by the team in the season */,
  "rebounding_margin" REAL /* Rebounding margin of the team in the season */,
  "turnover_margin" REAL /* Turnover margin of the team in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle, concussion) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "expected_recovery_time" TEXT /* Expected time for the player to recover from the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who received the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year, All-Star) */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
